runtimeGate.requirement: Chrome or headless browser renders nonblank UI, major elements, and major operations.
runtimeGate.method: Playwright Chromium desktop and mobile projects

checks.name: unit-and-build
checks.evidence: Vitest 5 files / 14 tests passed; Vite production build passed.

checks.name: runtime-gate
checks.evidence: 2 Playwright projects passed: chromium and mobile-chrome; checks include Japanese default UI, internal language switch API, primary controls, settings reset, hidden queue/settings headings, image-list toggle/reset, folder import replacement, export auto-reset, Fantia/Skeb logo-backed presets, Before/After preview, brush drag visualization, preview fit/zoom/pan, mobile queue auto-collapse, mobile horizontal settings groups, visible canvas, settings toggle, persisted suffix, and ZIP export.

checks.name: manual-docs
checks.evidence: README is user-facing and local-path-free; docs/user-guide.md contains the manual checklist.

checks.name: production-preview
checks.evidence: HTTP 200 for the built dist artifact at http://127.0.0.1:4176.

checks.name: github-pages-mirror
checks.evidence: index.html, favicon.svg, icons.svg, and bundled assets copied.

checks.name: docs-zip
checks.command: Compress README.md, governance docs, docs, and Issues
